source_display: Dumbest Possible AI philosophy - use cheap models with clever scripting
evidence: Vrijen advocated for using the 'dumbest possible AI' (cheaper models like GPT-4o-mini) and clever scripting/design patterns to simulate complex reasoning

source_display: Avoid RAG in favor of lightweight scripting
evidence: Careerspan avoids finicky RAG in favor of lightweight, constrained deployment to maintain consistency and lower COGS

source_display: Deep context extraction vs shallow resume data
evidence: Generic AI fails because it relies on shallow resume data. Careerspan's approach is to extract deep context through conversational deep-dives

evidence: Careerspan will focus on building founder brands/expertise to fund product development rather than pursuing VC investment
